---
title: "Indonesia Trade Flow Map"
subtitle: "Export and import flows by commodity and partner country"
date: 2025-02-01
categories: [Trade, Interactive, lang:English]
description: "An interactive map and chord diagram of Indonesian trade flows by major commodity groups and trading partners using BPS trade statistics."
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

Placeholder — replace with your Shiny or Observable embed.
